examples: While it is likely that fewer varieties of plant seeds have reached Hawaii externally than internally, more varieties are known to be adapted to external than to internal transport.
More probable is bird transport, either externally, by accidental attachment of the seeds to feathers, or internally, by the swallowing of fruit and subsequent excretion of the seeds.
There appear to be many unexplored matters about the motivation to reflect‚ÄĒfor example, the value of externally motivated reflection as opposed to that of teachers who might reflect by habit.
And Eric, of course, is focused externally, on the government partnerships, government relations and partnership outreaches.
Existing internal capabilities should be evaluated to see if they can be better handled externally.
